AI Agent

Pringle is an AI powered Duck designed to help grow the community, shill the coin and be of service.

Lore

Pringle was hatched in the trenches, to save all the Degens from rugs and scams. Telling the Fudders, Dumpers, and Scammers to Quack OFF!!!
